# LeX Feature Request

Before submitting, please:
1. Check if the feature is already requested in [Issues](https://github.com/your-repo-link/issues)
2. Verify the functionality isn't already supported via [KaTeX's features](https://katex.org/docs/supported.html)

---

## Feature Description
[Clearly describe the new capability you want to add]

**Example Use Case**:
[Describe a practical scenario where this would be useful]

## Proposed Implementation
[Optional: Suggest how this might be implemented]

## Related KaTeX Features
[Link to relevant KaTeX documentation if applicable]

## Priority
[ ] Critical - Missing core functionality  
[ ] High - Significant workflow improvement  
[ ] Medium - Nice-to-have enhancement  
[ ] Low - Niche use case  

## Alternatives Considered
[Describe any workarounds you've tried and their limitations]

## Additional Context
- Similar implementations in other tools: [e.g., "MathJax supports this via..."]
- Technical constraints: [e.g., "Would require AMSmath package"]

---

**For complex feature requests**, consider:
1. Providing sample LaTeX input
2. Showing expected rendering output
3. Outlining acceptance criteria

> Note: All features must remain compatible with KaTeX's supported syntax.
